---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a pull request
title: "type(scope): description"
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One or two sentences explaining what this PR accomplishes.

## Changes

List the files changed and what was modified.

- `path/to/file.py`: description of the change
- `path/to/another.py`: description of the change

## Testing

Describe how you tested these changes.

- [ ] `ruff format` passes
- [ ] `ruff check` passes
- [ ] `ty check` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (all tests)

## Notes

Any additional information the reviewer should know. Optional.
